title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Flipkart Books

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Flipkart Books
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Flipkart Books in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!
